Patch Set 5: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(30 inline comments)

Firstly, thank you for the clear and well-commented code - that makes this patch much easier to understand.  Also thanks for the update to the wiretest.c files to use tabs.

My main objections to this patch relate to the structures used in the wire protocol.  I'd like for those to be properly aligned and sized, so that there are no problems on architectures like IA64 (or others) that don't handle misaligned __u64 fields well.

It is definitely desirable that the llapi functions be under the LGPL, and it is a good start for you to add the new HSM methods with LGPL.  There was some discussion already about rewriting other parts of liblustreapi in order to improve the APIs, and make that under LGPL as well.

Patch Set 5: (30 inline comments)

I change the header for official LGPL one and add the LPGM licence.

About wirecheck.c, I have some questions on the non wire structures but used from user space caller and also on the other wire structures we have in other patches (see comments)
Uploaded patch set 6.

Patch Set 10: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 10:

I am concerned with two things in this patch.
First the LCOPYING file at the root of lustre tree that contains a copy of LGPL might mislead some people into believing Lustre is LGPL.

A more worrisome concern is liblustreapi_hsm.c is LGPL, but it;s linked to liblustreapi.c which is GPL.
GPL and LGPL are not really compatible, so I am not sure this is really allowed.

Patch Set 10:

Andreas thinks that GPL and LGPL are compatible for our purposes and liblustreapi_hsm.c code just becomes GPL when linked.

Please move LCOPYING fiel to lustre/util in a follow-on patch and make a note in it that it only applies to liblustre_api_hsm

Your change could not be merged due to a path conflict.

Please merge (or rebase) the change locally and upload the resolution for review.

Patch Set 10: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Ok, so there's a conflict in wiretest file and this patch needs to be rediffed.
Uploaded patch set 11.

commit.subject: LU-2062 hsm: llapi hsm calls for CopyTool
commit.message:
LU-2062 hsm: llapi hsm calls for CopyTool

llapi hsm calls for CopyTool
- llapi_hsm_copytool_start()
- llapi_hsm_copytool_fini()
- llapi_hsm_copytool_recv()
- llapi_hsm_copytool_free()
- llapi_hsm_copy_start()
- llapi_hsm_copy_end()
- llapi_hsm_progress()
- llapi_hsm_import()

and related MDT functions
- mdt_hsm_ct_register()
- mdt_hsm_ct_unregister()
- mdt_hsm_progress()

The new RPC are:
- MDS_HSM_CT_REGISTER
- MDS_HSM_CT_UNREGISTER
- MDS_HSM_PROGRESS

Signed-off-by: JC Lafoucriere <jacques-charles.lafoucriere@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I93617ac6e66a3324344b57f1a22d7c851d715262
